meanings: not in the same league as
sloshing around (of liquid in one's stomach)
(doing things) one's own way (esp. in an inconsiderate manner)
careless (with something, esp. time, money, promises, etc.)
person who has come of age
far (from something else in quality, degree, etc.)
a long time (since the last time)
tendency to become totally absorbed in something
feeling light (i.e. offering little resistance, moving easily)
being able to do as one pleases
main secondary or supporting role (in kyogen)
sticking out like a sore thumb
familiar with worldly pleasures (esp. sexual relations, geisha districts and red-light districts)
a lot of things to do
large drop (of rain, sweat, tears, etc.)
mass (e.g. mass production, mass transit, mass destruction)
low (rank, degree, value, content, quality, etc.)
to be at one's wits' end
venture which is unlikely to succeed
having nothing to do with one
frustrated (over a failure, humiliation or injustice)
refreshing (e.g. feeling, scene, wind, morning air)
thank you very much (for help, etc.)
short and repeated (movements; e.g. trembling, quick steps)
there is no way out of it
(doing or saying things) to suit one's own convenience
oblivious to the convenience of others
it should hardly be necessary to ...
such a thing has not happened
there is never a time when
